Creates a constant backoff.

## Import

```ts
import { constantBackoff } from "@graphrefly/ts/orchestration";
```

## Signature

```ts
function constantBackoff(delayMs: number): BackoffPolicy
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `delayMs` | `number` | delay MS value used by the helper. |

## Returns

The constant backoff result.

## Example

```ts
import { constantBackoff } from "@graphrefly/ts/orchestration";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/orchestration/resilience-bundles.ts`
